meaning: n.家庭第一主义的男人,喜欢在家消遣的男人
examples: Wife : No, I'd rather not. I'm a homebody. You knew that when we met.
A homebody at heart, the Crab enjoys a good home-cooked meal or take-out.
I'm a homebody, I'd rather be in the kitchen cooking than hanging out in a bar.
He says he was married and a homebody at the time of the kidnapping and never smoked cigars.
As a homebody, I will admit I enjoy cooking with friends and family, but the act of dining out is one fine indulgence.
